title: Login Issues
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still receive an 'invalid credentials' error.

title: Payment Update Failed
description: User is trying to update their credit card information for monthly billing, but the form submission is timing out and not saving the new card.

title: Invoice Download Blocked
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the billing section. The download button is unresponsive on both desktop and mobile devices.

title: Incorrect Login Alert
description: User is receiving email notifications about incorrect login attempts, but they haven't tried to log in recently. Concerned about account security.

title: App Crash on Android 13
description: Customer reports that the mobile app crashes immediately upon opening on their Android 13 device. Works fine on an older phone.

title: 2FA Code Not Received
description: Customer is not receiving 2FA codes on their registered phone number. They confirmed their number is correct in the profile settings.

title: Cannot Change Email
description: Attempting to update profile email to a new address, but receiving a 'failed to save' error every time the change is attempted.

title: Auto-Renewal Disabled
description: Customer wants to enable auto-renewal for their annual subscription, but the toggle in the dashboard appears greyed out and is unresponsive.

title: Exported Data Corrupted
description: The customer exported their activity data as a CSV, but the file is corrupted and cannot be opened by any spreadsheet software.

title: Wrong Product Delivered
description: Customer ordered Product A but received Product B. Needs a return label and the correct item shipped ASAP.

title: Profile Picture Upload Error
description: User is trying to update their profile picture, but the image uploader freezes at 99% and never completes the upload process.

title: Can't Apply Discount Code
description: The customer has a valid 15% discount code, but the field to enter it on the checkout page is missing or hidden.

title: API Key Expired Unexpectedly
description: Developer is reporting that their active API key suddenly showed an 'expired' status, breaking their integration. Needs urgent investigation.

title: Unsubscribe Link Broken
description: Customer attempted to unsubscribe from the weekly newsletter but the link in the footer of the email leads to a blank page.

title: Incorrect Charge Amount
description: Customer was charged $9.99 for the service but the advertised price is $7.99For Seeking a $2 .$7 refund and clarification.
